blocked_prediction_inputs: native contacts, distance maps, residue-residue proximity, and coordinate-derived topology
native biological assembly contacts and ligand/metal coordination geometry before sealing
AlphaFold, ESMFold, RoseTTAFold, or other structure models before sealing
post-seal validation annotations before prediction hash
prior score outcomes as prediction evidence
internal runtime artifacts as biological evidence

prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: CRYSTAL STRUCTURE OF COMPLEX BETWEEN D10 TCR AND PMHC I-AK/CA. Entity description: MHC I-AK B CHAIN (BETA CHAIN). Organism: Mus musculus. Polymer composition: protein/oligosaccharide. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies; withheld discovery hints: generic_complex_not_assembly_required. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V69 E65 metadata context marks: generic_complex_only. Known E65 marks are allowed; hard-topology discovery labels are withheld from prediction. generic complex alone is not assembly_required_core. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: generic complex wording is not treated as obligate assembly evidence

v69_context_policy.context_derivation: V69 E65 uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only. It carries established E65 marks but withholds hard-topology missing-word labels from prediction context so V69 can discover them.
reasons: generic complex wording is not treated as obligate assembly evidence
